message:
fix(engine): execution cell creation returns Result to prevent silent overwrites

CellManager::create_extension_cell and create_delegate_cell previously
returned &mut ExecutionCell directly, silently overwriting any existing
cell with the same ID. This masked duplicate-cell bugs in extension
loading and could corrupt in-flight obligation state.

Changes:
- execution_cell: create_extension_cell/create_delegate_cell now return
  Result<&mut ExecutionCell, CellError>, with a new CellAlreadyExists
  error variant for duplicate cell IDs; add error_code() and Display
  for the new variant
- cancellation_lifecycle: add CellAlreadyExists arm to the
  From<CellError> conversion so cancellation errors propagate correctly
- extension_host_lifecycle: map CellAlreadyExists to
  ExtensionAlreadyLoaded error, preventing double-load of extensions

Tests updated across 4 test files to unwrap() the new Result from
cell creation calls.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
